title: athyrium × pseudowardii
intro: Athyrium × pseudowardii, also known as the Lady's Frill or Lady's Finger Fern, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Athyrium genus of ferns. Traditionally, Athyrium × pseudowardii has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues and as a diuretic due to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of conditions such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds. Athyrium × pseudowardii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effectiveness and potential side effects.
